strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud platforms like AWS
Proven track record in AI-agent infrastructure and agentic workflow tooling at re:cinq
Strong open-source contributions and tooling expertise (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts, Trial)
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js, Vitest, or Playwright in resume despite being required stack
No clear evidence of recent hands-on work with Kotlin, Java, or Python in current roles
German language proficiency is only basic, which may hinder collaboration in Berlin-based enterprise environment
response.justification: Bogdan brings deep full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud systems, alongside notable AI-agent work and open-source tooling contributions that align closely with the role’s focus on internal automation and scalable engineering—though gaps in confirmed exposure to required frameworks like Nest.js and Vitest warrant closer evaluation.
